## Sanitization confirmation

- [ ] No customer or account name in any commit, branch name, file name, comment, or string
- [ ] No customer-bespoke object/field API names — replaced with generic placeholders

- [ ] No customer URL fragments, org aliases, or named-credential values
- [ ] No persona, contact, or stakeholder names from sample/seed data
- [ ] Branch is topic-named (`feature/<topic>`), not customer-named
